$comment: Folio spreads (design doc §6): groups of Compendium entries completed by FIXING a Pristine specimen of each listed resource into the journal's back pages. A completed spread grants a permanent effect that survives Migration; the Curator's Cabinet upgrade (folioSpreadBonusMult) scales the granted values while owned. Fixing is the three-way Pristine choice made real: trade the windfall at the Exchange, offer it to the Rite, or bank permanence here (the specimen is consumed by the page). Spread and effect sizes are first guesses: one spread per zone across all eight, plus the Warden's Gallery capstone (one fixing from every zone — the long cross-zone chase). Design §6 wants spreads of 4-8 entries (a balance follow-up, todo.md); the Warden's Gallery capstone grants kith slot 6 (design §4 ladder — the completed-spread moment). The full Compendium plates around them come with the art pass.
